prompt: Professional male plumber in a clean dark navy work shirt with 'Bravo Plumbing' embroidered patch, kneeling beside a residential water heater in a modern Atlanta-area home. Holding a pipe wrench, confident expression, focused on copper pipe fitting. Dramatic side lighting from a basement utility room window. Realistic, photojournalistic style. No visible service vehicles. Cool professional color grading with deep navy blue and warm copper accents. Aspect 16:9 landscape cinematic composition.
acceptance_criteria: Single plumber subject, professional not dirty/rough
Actively working on real plumbing fixture (water heater, pipe, or valve)
No visible faces if possible, or blurred/neutral face
Deep navy brand hue dominates the clothing/composition
Copper/brass accent element visible (pipe, fitting, fixture)
Interior residential setting (basement, utility room, or under-sink), not outdoor yard
No text, logos, or signage in frame
Sharp foreground detail, slightly soft background
Suitable for hero overlay with dark gradient bottom-left to top-right
